data.title: American Rebel (AREB) resolved Bank of America default, paid off debt, and secured financing, ensuring operational stability.
data.description: Recent corporate actions and transactions, which included making a full payment to Bank of America, have successfully mitigated legal risks and bolstered the company's balance sheet. This move has enhanced financial stability and positioned the company for future growth.

data.title: Wallick Investments applauds Inspire Investing for 4-star Morningstar rating on Inspire Fidelis Multi Factor ETF (FDLS) with $100M+ assets and 14.27% 3-year return as of Aug 31, 2025, out of 381 US Mid-Cap Blend funds.
data.description: In South Carolina, the Inspire Fidelis Multi Factor ETF, designed to mirror Wallick Investments, LLC’s Fidelis 100 Index, has achieved a 4-Star Morningstar Rating™ for its 3-year risk-adjusted performance among 381 US Mid-Cap Blend funds by August 31, 2025. This ETF, identified by ticker symbol FDLS, boasts assets exceeding $100 million with an impressive annualized 3-year return of 14.27% by the end of August 2025. Inspire Investing, known as the largest provider of faith-based ETFs globally, manages this successful fund.

data.title: Ascender® by Force Management hosts its third annual Networking Night for entry-level sales jobseekers on Oct 14 from 5:30-7:30 p.m. ET, connecting professionals with leading B2B tech companies.
data.description: Ascender®, the sales acceleration and eLearning platform by Force Management, is organizing its third annual Networking Night on Tuesday, October 14, from 5:30 to 7:30 p.m. ET. This virtual event links early-career sales professionals with hiring managers from prominent B2B tech firms. Started in 2023, Networking Night serves as a forum for Business Development Representatives (BDRs) and Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) to participate in small-group discussions.

data.title: SMArtX Advisory Solutions releases Q3 2025 Select List, highlighting top strategies for managed accounts.
data.description: A prominent company in managed account technology, SMArtX Advisory Solutions, based in West Palm Beach, Florida, revealed its Q3 2025 Select List. This list showcases strategies that have demonstrated outstanding performance in adapting to various market conditions. The release was made on September 26, 2025.

data.title: Over 300 industry professionals attend Hong Kong's Treasury Markets Summit 2025, highlighting Renminbi and AI's impact.
data.description: The recent Treasury Markets Summit held in Hong Kong highlighted the growth of Renminbi business and the impactful role of AI in treasury markets. More than 300 industry professionals attended the event to explore these key themes and discuss future trends.

data.title: Cipher stock up after Bitcoin miner increases debt offering to $1.1B post $3B Google deal.
data.description: Cipher Mining, a Bitcoin miner, has increased the price of its convertible debt offering following the announcement of a $3 billion deal supported by Google.

data.title: Intel and Boeing stocks rally, while Silver hits $46 and Bitcoin drops below $110,000. Market sees modest gains, S&P 500 up 0.4% to 6,630, Nasdaq 100 up 0.2% to 24,440, and Russell 2000 up 0.5%. Dow Jones Industrial Average advances 0.7%. Intel surges over 5% and gains 20% weekly, with Boeing climbing nearly 4%. Turkish Airlines places orders for 75 787 Dreamliners and up to 150 737 MAX aircraft. Intel approaches Apple for potential investment and reaches out to TSM, boosting optimism.
data.description: Wall Street saw modest gains by midday Friday, with the S&P 500 up 0.4% at 6,630 and the Nasdaq 100 rising 0.2% to 24,440. The Russell 2000 rebounded by 0.5%. The Dow Jones Industrial Average led the gains, advancing by 0.7%. Intel Corp. surged over 5%, with a weekly gain of 20%, following Nvidia Corp's $5 billion investment pledge. Intel also approached Apple Inc. and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., further boosting investor optimism. Boeing Inc. climbed nearly 4% after Turkish Airlines agreed to purchase 75 787 Dreamliners and up to 150 737 MAX aircraft.

Bowman Says Changing Enhanced Supplementary Leverage Ratio Could Fix Some Issues, Like Problems With Traditional Facilities Such As Standing Repo. Also Notes That Slower Population Growth And Aging Population Are Key Factors Lowering the Neutral Rate.
Fed's Bowman: Smaller balance sheet as a percentage of GDP gives the Fed more optionality to respond to future shocks.
Fed's Bowman: The lower level of reserves might encourage banks to be more active in reserve positions and liquidity risk management.
Fed's Bowman: Reforming enhanced supplementary leverage ratio would address some of the problems permanent facilities like standing repo were designed to mitigate.
Fed's Bowman: Emergency lending facilities should be limited to single-purpose use in emergencies and not made permanent.
Fed's Bowman: Balance sheet tilted toward more shorter-dated securities would offer more flexibility.
Fed's Bowman: I strongly support holding only treasuries.
Fed's Bowman Speech on 'the approach to monetary policy decision-making'
Fed's Bowman: I see slower population growth and an ageing population as more prominent factors in pulling down neutral rate.
